name: com.maxoperf/maxoperf
description: Load & browser performance testing — drive MaxoPerf from your AI agent with your API key.

headers.name: Authorization
headers.description: Bearer <MaxoPerf API key, e.g. mpak_...> — create one in the MaxoPerf console under Settings > API keys.

io.maxoperf/packaging.sourceOfTruth: packaging/mcp/ssot.mjs (derives from deploy/helm/maxoperf/values-prod.yaml publicWebOrigin, per subtask-03 SSOT)
